65 = 
End-Stage Renal Disease Treatment Facility. A facility other than a hospital, which provides 
dialysis treatment, maintenance, and/or training to patients or caregivers on an ambulatory or 
home-care basis. 
66–70 =Unassigned. N/A 
71 = 
Public Health Clinic. A facility maintained by either State or local health departments that 
provides ambulatory primary medical care under the general direction of a physician. 
72 = 
Rural Health Clinic. A certified facility
